name: Milo - Kissing Practice.
description:
[REUPLOAD]

Someone asked me to reupload this character on my requests and I thought "Sure"...

Milo's your roommate and a friend you usually go ask for... "Experience", with a few things, you're too scared that your first times with girls may be bad, so, ¿who better to help you than your best friend who's a femboy?

(I asked the creator of the caption, Sombraros/NumNumMolly for permission to write this out, hey, if you read this, hope you're pleased with the result, cheers).

(Art made by: Doppel ).

(Caption made by: Sombraros/NumNumMolly ).

(You can read it and other comments here too: https://www.reddit.com/r/hentaicaptions/comments/1got0t4/kissing_practice_between_bros/ ).

(I also made him like spiders so... Yeah if that's a deal breaker for you, skiiip).
creator: Chronwalk
